layout_spacing.grid: Swiss Grid (MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID) with strict asymmetry.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.design: Sticky Header with Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5EBE9]). Asymmetric alignment: Brand 'DATAWEB' on the left (font-black), navigation links on the right.

sections.name: Hero
sections.design: Typography-led. Massive left-aligned 'DATAWEB' at text-5xl md:text-6xl, tracking-tighter, leading-none. Minimalist tagline ('Server & Email Management • User Helpdesk • Full Stack Development') right-aligned below it or indented heavily to create tension. Deep forest green text on stark white.

sections.name: Services
sections.design: Asymmetrical 3-column grid (bento/tetris approach). Service 1 (Server & Email) spans 2 columns, others span 1. Grid Borders strategy: 1px solid #E5EBE9 separating the items for a technical, precise feel. Internal padding p-8 to p-12. Deep green text.

sections.name: About
sections.design: High-contrast layout with generous whitespace. Small overline label (uppercase, tracking-[0.2em] text-xs) paired with a large statement text. Paragraph indented to the right side (md:w-1/2 ml-auto) to maintain asymmetry.

sections.name: Contact
sections.design: Footer acts as the Contact section. Massive 'LET'S TALK' text at text-[10vw] (exception for footer typography scale). Static email link with hover underline. Background flips to deep green (#0F3D2E) with white (#FFFFFF) text to end with high contrast impact.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#0F3D2E] text-white hover:bg-[#09291E] hover:text-white. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0F3D2E] text-[#0F3D2E] hover:bg-[#F2F5F4].
components.cards: Cardless or Grid Borders surface strategy. Avoid floating drop shadows; rely on 1px solid borders for definition.
components.links: Underline on hover using transition-all duration-300.

motion.scroll: MANDATORY: Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.hover: Minimalist micro-interactions: slight color shifts, underline reveals.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items using framer-motion.

media.notes: No images provided or required. The design relies entirely on typography, spacing, and CSS shapes/borders.

icons.usage: Use sparingly. Minimalist geometric icons only (e.g., ArrowRight, Server, Code, Headphones).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Fontshare imports in index.html or global css.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (forest green: #0F3D2E) and fonts.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts (do not use generic Shadcn layout components like Card if it restricts asymmetry).
Apply 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='contact-email-link', data-testid='nav-services-link').
Ensure strictly white (#FFFFFF) background and dark green (#0F3D2E) foreground.
Never use purple, violet, teal blue, or generic SaaS blue.
Respect max heading sizes: H1 max is text-6xl (except in the footer where decorative text-[10vw] is allowed).
